issues.message: All variables use 'var' instead of 'const'/'let' throughout the file
issues.solution: Replace all 'var' with 'const' (for non-reassigned) or 'let' (for reassigned)

issues.message: 'var messages = []' declared but never read or written
issues.solution: Remove the dead variable declaration

issues.message: WebSocket close event callback parameter named 'connection' shadows outer connection variable. The 'close' event provides (code, description) not a connection object. connection.remoteAddress will be undefined.
issues.solution: Rename parameter: connection.on('close', function(code, reason) { ... })

issues.message: clients.splice(index, 1) uses closure-captured index. If a lower-indexed client disconnects first, subsequent indices become stale, causing wrong client removal.
issues.solution: Use filter: clients = clients.filter(c => c !== connection)

issues.message: HTTP server callback is empty. Non-WebSocket HTTP requests receive no response and hang indefinitely.
issues.solution: Return 426 Upgrade Required for all HTTP requests: res.writeHead(426); res.end('WebSocket only');

issues.message: Mixed && and || without explicit parentheses in searchPerson(). Operator precedence makes conditions technically correct but unreadable and fragile.
issues.solution: Rewrite using array.filter() with explicit parentheses around each condition group

issues.message: connect() has no onerror or onclose handler. WebSocket failures are silent.
issues.solution: Add socket.onerror and socket.onclose handlers; update component status; add reconnect logic

issues.message: Watcher fires sendMessage() before WebSocket is in OPEN state, throwing an error on keystroke.
issues.solution: Guard with: if (this.socket?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) { ... }

issues.message: Hardcoded test data (5 persons with real-format IBANs/BICs) embedded in production component data().
issues.solution: Extract to src/fixtures/persons.js, guard with import.meta.env.DEV, or replace with API call

issues.message: zahlungsempfaenger_selected initialized as string '' but later assigned object {iban, bic, valid_from}
issues.solution: Initialize as null: zahlungsempfaenger_selected: null

issues.message: cellpadding=4 is a deprecated HTML4 presentational attribute
issues.solution: Remove cellpadding; use CSS: td { padding: 4px; }

issues.message: :value="item" on <tr> elements has no effect; the value attribute is not valid on tr elements
issues.solution: Remove :value="item" from both v-for table rows

issues.message: panel.add(textArea) called twice in succession (lines 221 and 222). Swing silently reparents the component.
issues.solution: Remove the first panel.add(textArea) call on line 221

issues.message: Same double panel.add(textArea) bug as Main.java. Lines 188 and 189.
issues.solution: Remove the first panel.add(textArea) call on line 188

issues.message: 130+ lines of manual streaming JSON parsing using boolean flags. Fragile and verbose.
issues.solution: Replace with Jackson ObjectMapper or Jakarta JSON Binding: mapper.readValue(json, SearchResult.class)

issues.message: Uses java.net.HttpURLConnection (Java 1.1 legacy API). Project targets Java 22.
issues.solution: Replace with java.net.http.HttpClient (available since Java 11)

issues.message: new Scanner(connection.getInputStream()) is never closed, leaking the HTTP connection on error paths.
issues.solution: Wrap in try-with-resources: try (var scanner = new Scanner(connection.getInputStream())) { ... }

issues.message: model.get(val).getField().toString() throws NullPointerException when any field is null (all are initialized to null).
issues.solution: Replace with: String.valueOf(model.get(val).getField())

issues.message: IOException and InterruptedException wrapped in RuntimeException in ActionListener. No user feedback on failure.
issues.solution: Show JOptionPane.showMessageDialog() on error; restore interrupt flag for InterruptedException

issues.message: System.out.println used throughout Java code for logging (PocPresenter lines 62,73,93; HttpBinService lines 30,31; Main lines 14,28,37,53)
issues.solution: Replace with SLF4J + Logback: private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(X.class)

issues.message: ViewData is an empty class with no fields or methods. Dead code placeholder.
issues.solution: Delete the file

issues.message: CountDownLatch.await() called in WebsocketClientEndpoint constructor, which may block the Swing EDT if called from the UI thread.
issues.solution: Perform WebSocket connection on a background thread: new Thread(() -> new WebsocketClientEndpoint(...)).start()

security_issues.message: request.accept(null, request.origin) accepts WebSocket connections from ALL origins with no validation.
security_issues.solution: Validate request.origin against an allowlist before calling request.accept()

security_issues.message: All communication uses ws:// and http:// (plaintext). IBAN, BIC, and personal data transmitted in cleartext.
security_issues.solution: Use wss:// and https:// with TLS certificates

security_issues.message: WebSocket URL 'ws://localhost:1337/' hardcoded in component. Cannot be changed without code modification.

security_issues.type: Sensitive Test Data in Production Code
security_issues.message: Real-format IBANs, BICs, and personal names hardcoded in production component data(). Pattern invites real data commitment.
security_issues.solution: Extract to dev-only fixtures file; use mock API for test data

security_issues.message: Scanner on HTTP input stream never closed. Leaks connections on error paths.
getField().toString() on null field value causes NPE crash before HTTP call executes.
security_issues.solution: Use String.valueOf() and add field validation before submission

technical_debt.description: Vue 2 EOL — entire frontend requires migration to Vue 3
technical_debt.suggested_fix: Migrate to Vue 3 + Vite. Rewrite components using <script setup> Composition API.

technical_debt.description: Java javax.* to jakarta.* migration required across all imports
technical_debt.suggested_fix: Replace all javax.websocket.*, javax.json.* imports with jakarta.websocket.*, jakarta.json.*

technical_debt.description: websocket npm package (non-standard) should be replaced with ws (standard)
technical_debt.suggested_fix: npm uninstall websocket && npm install ws; rewrite WebsocketServer.js using ws API

technical_debt.description: 130+ lines of manual JSON streaming parser in Main.java
technical_debt.suggested_fix: Add Jackson ObjectMapper dependency; replace extract() and toSearchResult() with mapper.readValue()
Rewrite HttpBinService using HttpClient.newHttpClient() and HttpRequest.newBuilder()

technical_debt.description: Zero automated tests across all three sub-systems
technical_debt.suggested_fix: Add Vitest for Vue, node:test for Node server, JUnit 5 + Mockito for Java

technical_debt.description: No CI/CD pipeline. No GitHub Actions workflows.
technical_debt.suggested_fix: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml with build/lint/test jobs for all three sub-systems

node_server.recommended: Resolved by replacing websocket with ws
